content:
💡 Framely | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A boilerplate for developers to quickly build and deploy multi-tenant websites with a drag-and-drop editor.
✨ Key Features: • Drag-and-Drop Website Builder • Multi-Tenancy (Subdomains) • User Authentication (Clerk) • Dashboard for site management • Customizable UI components (Shadcn UI)
📖 Summary: Framely is an open-source, full-stack website builder boilerplate built with Next.js. It provides a drag-and-drop interface for creating websites, supports multi-tenancy with subdomains, and includes user authentication via Clerk.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 map-to-poster | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating custom, high-resolution map posters for wall art or personalized gifts.
✨ Key Features: • Hybrid Rendering System (Leaflet & MapLibre GL) • Precision Geocoding (Nominatim API) • Dynamic Markers • Custom Travel Paths • Mat / Passepartout Framing
📖 Summary: MapToPoster JS is a client-side JavaScript web application that allows users to generate high-resolution, customizable map posters from any location. It offers a hybrid rendering system, dynamic styling options, and pro-grade export capabilities for creating personalized geographic art.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 ui-act | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automate repetitive or complex GUI-based tasks on a Linux desktop by interpreting natural language prompts and executing them using simulated mouse and keyboard input.
✨ Key Features: • Automates computer tasks via text prompts • Uses its own mouse and keyboard for actions • Works alongside the user without hogging input • Integrates directly into the Linux desktop environment • Supports Anthropic as a backend
📖 Summary: UI Act is a Rust-based computer use agent for Linux that automates tasks by controlling the user's mouse and keyboard. It integrates with the desktop environment, allowing users to continue working while the agent performs actions triggered by text prompts, leveraging Multi-Pointer X for independent control.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ PicView | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Viewing and managing a wide variety of image file formats on desktop operating systems with a customizable and efficient user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Supports numerous image formats (WEBP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, HEIC, PSD, etc.) • Fast and free • Customizable UI with light/dark themes • No ads or tracking • Available for Windows and macOS
📖 Summary: PicView is a fast, free, and customizable image viewer for macOS and Windows. It supports a wide array of image formats, including animated WEBP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, HEIC, and PSD, offering a clean user experience without ads or tracking. Users can choose between light and dark themes and customize the interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
